title: Selection Box Component
description: Defines the area of the block that is selected by the player's cursor.

origin.description: Minimal position of the bounds of the selection box. Specified as [x, y, z] and must be in the range (-8, 0, -8) to (8, 16, 8), inclusive.

size.description: Size of each side of the selection box. Specified as [x, y, z]. origin + size must be in the range (-8, 0, -8) to (8, 16, 8), inclusive.
